query:
SELECT indexador, COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as min_taxa,
  MAX(CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as max_taxa,
  AVG(CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as avg_taxa,
  MIN(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as min_z,
  MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as max_z,
  AVG(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as avg_z
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY indexador
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT indexador, COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as min_taxa,
  MAX(CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as max_taxa,
  AVG(CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as avg_taxa,
  MIN(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as min_z,
  MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as max_z,
  AVG(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as avg_z
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY indexador
ORDER BY total DESC;
